comment: insanely TERRIBLE ux design. Once you "backup" pics they're no longer organized in folders like the camera folder, and instead mixed with all photos including screenshots and downloads into one folder. Also because of this "feature" other apps cant find pics that are backed up and instead only show what's on your phone.
the function of activity: This activity allows users to navigate to library/memories/search, cast content, back up photos, favorite items, and access various editing and sharing options.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Account Settings', 'description': 'Accessing and managing account settings'}, {'name': 'Backup Photos', 'description': 'Enabling and managing photo backup settings'}, {'name': 'Free Up Space', 'description': 'Deleting and managing storage space for photos'}, {'name': 'Photos Settings', 'description': 'Adjusting various settings related to photos'}, {'name': 'Help and Feedback', 'description': 'Accessing help and feedback options'}, {'name': 'Privacy Policy', 'description': 'Viewing the privacy policy'}, {'name': 'Terms of Service', 'description': 'Viewing the terms of service'}]
